安妮.description_template: Anne: A slim young girl (11 years old) with distinctive red hair styled in two long braids tied with GREEN RIBBONS (identifying feature), bright green eyes, round freckled face, wearing a simple grey Victorian dress with white collar, energetic and expressive demeanor
安妮.hair: distinctive red hair in two long braids
安妮.build: slim young girl, about 11 years old
安妮.clothing: simple grey Victorian dress with white collar
安妮.unique_accessory: green ribbon hair ties on braids
安妮.distinctive_features: red braided hair, freckles, green ribbons

戴安娜.description_template: Diana: A young girl (11 years old) with neat black hair styled in a refined way, dark brown eyes, elegant features, smooth complexion, wearing PEARL PENDANT NECKLACE (identifying feature), well-made Victorian dress in dark blue colors, composed and graceful posture
戴安娜.hair: neat black hair in a refined style
戴安娜.build: young girl, about 11 years old, graceful posture
戴安娜.clothing: well-made Victorian dress in dark blue or burgundy colors
戴安娜.distinctive_features: refined appearance, dark hair, pearl necklace

瑪麗亞.description_template: Marilla: A middle-aged woman (50s) with grey hair pulled back in a strict bun, stern but kind grey-blue eyes, angular face with defined features, wearing SMALL CAMEO BROOCH at collar (identifying feature), practical Victorian dress in dark grey or black with high collar, upright and proper posture
瑪麗亞.hair: grey hair in a strict bun
瑪麗亞.clothing: practical Victorian dress in dark grey or black with high collar
瑪麗亞.distinctive_features: grey hair bun, stern expression, cameo brooch

馬修.description_template: Matthew: An elderly man (60s) with weathered face, kind brown eyes, grey-white beard, wearing OLD POCKET WATCH with visible chain (identifying feature), simple farmer's clothing with suspenders and worn hat, gentle and quiet demeanor
馬修.face: weathered face with lines, gentle expression
馬修.clothing: simple farmer's clothing, suspenders, worn hat
馬修.unique_accessory: old pocket watch with visible chain
馬修.distinctive_features: grey beard, kind eyes, farmer appearance, pocket watch

巴利夫人.description_template: Mrs. Barry: A stern middle-aged woman (40s) with dark hair pulled back tightly, sharp eyes, prominent features, wearing SILVER BROOCH at high collar (identifying feature), formal Victorian dress in dark colors, rigid and proper posture
巴利夫人.clothing: formal Victorian dress in dark colors, high collar
巴利夫人.distinctive_features: stern expression, rigid posture, silver brooch

蜜妮.description_template: Minnie May: A small child (3-4 years old) with soft blonde curls, rosy cheeks, wearing a simple child's nightgown, looking ill and pale
蜜妮.eyes: light eyes (currently closed or barely open due to illness)
蜜妮.face: rosy cheeks (when healthy), pale when ill
